channel.description: Recent content in Jeremydmiller.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Fun Five Year Retrospective on Marten Adoption
item.description: In the midst of some let’s call it “market” research to better understand how Marten stacks up to a newer competitor, I stumbled back over a GitHub discussion I initiated in 2021 called “What would it take for you to adopt Marten?” long before I was able to found JasperFx Software. I seeded this original … Continue reading Fun Five Year Retrospective on Marten Adoption → Link to article: https://jeremydmiller.com/2026/03/06/fun-five-year-retrospective-on-marten-adoption/
